title: Configure Oban with testing: :manual in test config
prompt: Update `config/test.exs` to configure Oban with `config :my_app, Oban, testing: :manual` so that no jobs execute automatically in tests. Include a brief `# ` comment explaining that `:manual` means jobs are inserted but not run automatically.
tier_rationale: Canonical config line — documented in Oban testing guide.
research_citation: "Both testing modes prevent Oban from running any database queries in the background. This simultaneously prevents Sandbox errors from plugin queries and prevents queues from executing jobs unexpectedly." — Oban testing docs
